metadata.og:title: ADA Annual Session Las Vegas - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.ogDescription: In the month of October 2011, a colleague and I visited the American Dental Association Convention in Las Vegas at Mandalay Bay. It never ceases to amaze me as to how may dentists and auxiliary staff attend these annual sessions. Every year the ADA rotates the site for this convention – and this year it […]
